description_long: This is a compact, white Suzuki minivan with a boxy shape and rounded edges, commonly seen in urban environments. The front features a black grille with the Suzuki logo, rectangular headlights, and side mirrors mounted on the doors. The sides have sliding doors and large, rectangular windows, with black trim running along the lower body. The rear is characterized by a large window, simple taillights, and a plain bumper. The wheels are small and covered with hubcaps, and the vehicle sits relatively low to the ground. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing interior space and visibility.
description: A white, boxy Suzuki minivan with large windows, sliding doors, and a utilitarian design for urban use.
description_view_0: Front and left side view showing the Suzuki grille, headlights, side mirrors, and sliding door.
description_view_1: Rear and left side view highlighting the large rear window, taillights, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear and right side view with clear visibility of the rear bumper, right sliding door, and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Front and right side view showing the Suzuki badge, windshield, and right-side sliding door.
attribute_window_configuration: Two large rectangular side windows per side, one rear window, one front windshield, and small front door windows.
